Cross-Petition For Reimbursement Of Expenses And Fees
Off Calendar Jun-03-2014 Text Ruling

Petition For Redress For Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar Jun-03-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert White and Lassen Soren. Andrew Zabronsky for Michael Kilroy.

The Petition for Redress for Breach of Trust and Cross-Petition for Reimbursement of Expenses and Fees was referred to the department of the Presiding Judge (206) to be set for trial, (order for the same signed in open court).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Cross-Petition For Reimbursement Of Expenses And Fees
Off Calendar Apr-01-2014 Continued To Jun-03-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert White for Lassen Soren and Caroline Brown (Petitioners/Cross- Respondents). Andrew Zabronsky for Michael Kilroy.

Mr. White stated that mediation was unsuccessful. Mr. Zabronsky stated that discovery was needed. The Cross Petition for Reimbursement of Expenses and Fees, and the Petition for Redress for Breach of Trust were continued to June 3, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for an order referring the matter to the trial department (206). Counsel are to see what information can be exchanged voluntarily.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Redress For Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar Apr-01-2014 Continued To Jun-03-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Redress For Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar Feb-18-2014 Continued To Apr-01-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Redress For Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar Feb-04-2014 Continued To Feb-18-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Redress For Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar Nov-19-2013 Continued To Feb-04-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert White for Lassen Soren and Caroline Brown. Andrew Zabronsky for Michael Kilroy.

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than January 24, 2014. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by January 24, 2014. The Petition for Redress for Breach of Trust was continued to and the Parties are to return on February 4, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition For Redress For Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar Oct-22-2013 Continued To Nov-19-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
